subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! Thou knowest the depths of my heart, the yearning of my spirit and my highest aspirations, and Thou beholdest my weakness and my powerlessness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انت تعلم منی قلبی و بغیه روحی و غایه آمالی و تری ضعفی و عجزی و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
